engine.phase3.approval.rationale: Approval state machine and audit entries.

engine.phase3.context.rationale: Approved downstream context loader and immutable context object.

engine.phase3.contracts.rationale: Public version contract constants used by Phase 3 models.

engine.phase3.eipv.rationale: Standalone EIPV estimator consumed through phase3 public API.

engine.phase3.expected_return.sensitivit.rationale: Optional sensitivity analysis utility exported in public API.

engine.phase3.paper_portfolio_governance.rationale: Paper recommendation governance evaluator with fail-closed approval flow.
Immutable paper recommendation policy contract and validation rules.
Immutable governance state, recommendation, and audit types.

engine.phase3.paper_portfolio_engine.__i.rationale: Paper portfolio engine package export surface.

engine.phase3.paper_portfolio_engine.mod.rationale: Deterministic paper-only portfolio simulator with fail-closed controls.

engine.phase3.paper_portfolio_engine.typ.rationale: Immutable paper engine position, transaction, performance, and audit types.

engine.phase3.paper_portfolio_persistenc.rationale: Paper portfolio persistence/replay package export surface.
Immutable paper persistence event, approval, checkpoint, and lot contracts.
SQLite paper-only repository with transactional persistence and lifecycle enforcement.
Append-only deterministic event ledger with hash-chain integrity validation.
Canonical persistence orchestrator consuming governance and paper-engine outputs.
Deterministic replay and canonical-state reconciliation model.

engine.phase3.paper_portfolio_operations.rationale: Paper portfolio operations package export surface.
Immutable operations policy, session, request, reconciliation, health, and audit contracts.
Fail-closed preflight gating model for paper operations readiness.
Manual-only operations controller with deterministic sessions and request gating.
Reconciliation, health classification, and operations audit construction.
SQLite-safe backup, verify, and restore test orchestration for paper storage.
Deterministic daily operations reporting for operator visibility.

engine.phase3.independent_system_certifi.rationale: Independent artifact, hash, dependency, lifecycle, and replay certification model.

engine.phase3.paper_portfolio_activation.rationale: Paper portfolio activation-gate package export surface.
Immutable activation policy, role assignment, attestation, and decision contracts.
Fail-closed manual-paper activation gate with deterministic decisioning and revocation handling.
